name: Merge Versions Plus
description: Fork of Merge Versions with a configurable primary version selection strategy
overview: Groups repeated movies/episodes with a selectable primary-version strategy (file size, resolution, bitrate)

versions.changelog: Adds a live one-line status window below the Update Defaults progress bar showing the exact movie/episode currently being processed, via a new CurrentStatus endpoint polled alongside task progress.

Fixes a fire-and-forget bug in movie merging (Parallel.ForEach with an async lambda) that could starve the thread pool and stall progress on large libraries. Adds an "Update Defaults" button with a live progress bar on the config page to re-apply the primary version strategy to already-merged items on demand.

Primary version strategy now applies retroactively to already-merged items on every Merge run (manual or scheduled) - no more split/re-merge needed to pick up a strategy change. Fixes a self-reference bug when swapping an existing primary for a new one.
Initial release: configurable primary version selection strategy (file size, resolution, bitrate)
